summary: Completed modular refactoring verification test. Backend refactored from monolithic 5300+ lines server.py to 15 modular router files. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend pages verified: Dashboard, /brand-tools, /naming all load correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Navigating directly to /naming from fresh browser session redirects to /login. Works correctly when navigating from dashboard. Likely a ProtectedRoute timing issue with token loading.

issues: Tutorial modal appears and blocks interaction - users need to dismiss it manually

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login demo@labrand.com - returns token and user data
GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/ads/providers - returns meta and google providers
GET /api/crm/providers - returns CRM providers (rdstation, hubspot, kommo)
Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly with sidebar and brand progress
Frontend: /brand-tools page loads with 6 tabs (Score, PDF, Alertas, Social, Concorrentes, Conteúdo)
Frontend: Brand Score displays unified_score=38 (Crítico) with 4 dimensions
Frontend: /naming page loads with Estúdio de Naming interface
critical_code_review_comments: Modular refactoring successfully completed - monolithic server.py (5300+ lines) split into 15 router files
All API endpoints functional after refactoring
Route organization: auth.py, brands.py, brand_tools.py, ads.py, crm.py, touchpoints.py, naming.py, extras.py, admin.py, pillars.py, ai.py, credits.py, plans.py, stripe.py, maturity.py
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user and brand

mocked_apis_verified.naming generation: MOCK - Returns generated names without actual AI

features_verified.brand_score: Unified score with 4 dimensions (estrategia, experiencia, maturidade, consistencia)
features_verified.ads_providers: Meta and Google Ads providers available
features_verified.crm_providers: RD Station, HubSpot, Kommo providers available
features_verified.touchpoints: Touchpoints with funnel phases, stats, financial data
features_verified.extras: Templates by sector, competitor groups, dashboard metrics

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic to modular architecture verified. All 15 router files (auth, brands, brand_tools, ads, crm, touchpoints, naming, extras, admin, pillars, ai, credits, plans, stripe, maturity) tested and working. Frontend pages Dashboard, /brand-tools, /naming all functional. Minor issue: Direct navigation to protected routes from fresh session may redirect to login (timing issue with token loading). Use demo@labrand.com/password123 for testing.
